Export.Routine: DVPXRX1 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform Pharmacy Wrapper Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;VA POINT OF SERVICE (KIOSKS);**19**;Oct 21, 2011;Build 64 ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; PSS50 4533 ; VASITE 10112 ; XLFDT 10103 ; XLFSTR 10104 ; DVPUTL Q ; SETMULT(DVPOCL,INDEX,TYPE,ID) ; sets the multiples N I,J,SIG,SPINST,ROUTE,SCHED,ADMIN,RMV,ADDITVS,SOLUTION ; SIG for Outpatient or INSTRUCTIONS for Inpatient S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"SIG",I)) Q:'I S SIG=$G(^(I,0)) D . S J=J+1 I SIG]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,$S(TYPE="outpatient":"sig",1:"instructions"),J)=SIG ; Special Instructions S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"SIO",I)) Q:'I S SPINST=$G(^(I,0)) D . S J=J+1 I SPINST]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"specialInstructions",J)=SPINST ; Med Route Abbr. S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"MDR",I)) Q:'I S ROUTE=$G(^(I,0)) D . S J=J+1 I ROUTE]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"route",J)=ROUTE ; Schedule S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"SCH",I)) Q:'I S SCHED=$G(^(I,0)) D . S J=J+1 I SCHED]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"schedule",J)=SCHED ; Administration Times S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"ADM",I)) Q:'I S ADMIN=$G(^(I,0)) D . S J=J+1 I ADMIN]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"administrationTimes",J)=ADMIN ; Removal Times S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"RMV",I)) Q:'I S RMV=$G(^(I,0)) D . S J=J+1 I RMV]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"removalTimes",J)=RMV ; Additives S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"A",I)) Q:'I S ADDITVS=$G(^(I,0)) D . S J=J+1 . I $P(ADDITVS,U)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"additiveName",J)=$P(ADDITVS,U) . I $P(ADDITVS,U,2)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"additiveAmount",J)=$P(ADDITVS,U,2) . I $P(ADDITVS,U,3)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"additiveBottle",J)=$P(ADDITVS,U,3) ; Solutions S (J,I)=0 F S I=$O(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"B",I)) Q:'I S SOLUTION=$G(^(I,0)) D . S J=J+1 . I $P(SOLUTION,U)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"solutionName",J)=$P(SOLUTION,U) . I $P(SOLUTION,U,2)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"solutionAmount",J)=$P(SOLUTION,U,2) Q ; SETZERO(X,TYPE,ID) ; sets the zero node I $P($P(X,U),";",2)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"patientStatus")=$P($P(X,U),";",2) I $P(X,U,2)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"drug")=$P(X,U,2) I $P(X,U,3)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"infusionRate")=$P(X,U,3) I $P(X,U,4)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"stopDate")=$P(X,U,4)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(X,U,4)) I $P(X,U,5)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"refillsRemaining")=$P(X,U,5) I $P(X,U,6)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"totalDose")=$P(X,U,6) I $P(X,U,7)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"unitsPerDose")=$P(X,U,7) I $P(X,U,8)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"orderId")=+$P(X,U,8) I $P(X,U,9)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"status")=$P(X,U,9) I $P(X,U,10)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"lastFillDate")=$P(X,U,10)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(X,U,10)) I $P(X,U,11)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"daysSupply")=$P(X,U,11) I $P(X,U,12)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"quantity")=$P(X,U,12) I $P(X,U,13)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"notToBeGiven")=$P(X,U,13) I $P(X,U,14)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"pendingRenewal")=$S($P(X,U,14):"true",1:"false") I $P(X,U,15)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"startDate")=$P(X,U,15)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(X,U,15)) I $P(X,U,16)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"lastReleaseDateTime")=$P(X,U,16)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(X,U,16)) I $P(X,U,17)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,ID,"lastFillDaySupply")=$P(X,U,17) Q ; PSDRUG(DRUG,UID,TYPE) ; Get Drug Data N VAPROD,VUID K ^TMP($J,"DRUG") D DATA^PSS50(DRUG,"","","","","DRUG") Q:'$D(^TMP($J,"DRUG",0)) S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,UID,"drugClassificationCode")=$P($G(^TMP($J,"DRUG",DRUG,25)),U,2) S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,UID,"drugClassificationName")=$P($G(^TMP($J,"DRUG",DRUG,25)),U,3) S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,UID,"dispenseUnit")=$G(^TMP($J,"DRUG",DRUG,14.5)) S VAPROD=$G(^TMP($J,"DRUG",DRUG,22)) I VAPROD="" S VAPROD=DRUG_U_$G(^TMP($J,"DRUG",DRUG,.01)),VUID=$P($$SITE^VASITE,U,3)_$$REPEAT^XLFSTR(0,15)_DRUG E S VUID=$$VUID^DVPXUTL(+VAPROD,50.68) S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,UID,"product")=$P(VAPROD,U,2) S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,UID,"productId")=$$SETVURN^DVPXUTL("vuid",VUID) K ^TMP("PSOR",$J) Q ; PROVIDER(PRV,UID,FLD,TYPE) ; Get Provider Specs N X,PROV D PROVIDER^DVPXUTL(.PROV,PRV,FLD) M @TARGET@("results",TYPE,UID)=PROV Q ; RXSLOOP(SFILE,RXIEN,NODE,TYPE) ; Loop through subfiles and get field names and values I $G(RXUID)="" S RXUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,RXIEN,"52") N X,SFLD,SFLDNAME S X=0 F S X=$O(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X)) Q:'X D . S SFLD=0 F S SFLD=$O(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X,SFLD)) Q:'SFLD D . . I $D(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X,SFLD))=1 D Q . . . S SFLDNAME=$$GETFLD^DVPUTL(SFILE,SFLD) . . . I SFLDNAME]"#" S SFLDNAME=$REPLACE(SFLDNAME,"#",$S($E(SFLDNAME,1)="#":"NUMBER ",1:" NUMBER ")) . . . S SFLDNAME=$TR(SFLDNAME,"-_/"," ") . . . S SFLDNAME=$$CONVERT^DVPUTL(SFLDNAME) . . . I SFLDNAME]"",@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X,SFLD)]"" S @TARGET@("results",TYPE,RXUID,NODE,X,SFLDNAME)=$S($P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X,SFLD),U,2)]"":$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X,SFLD),U,2),1:@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD,X,SFLD)) Q
